CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. Sums the Amount of won Opportunities closed this year where this Contact has the primary Opportunity Contact Role. Uses the Won Opportunities for Hard Credit filter group. Fiscal vs. calendar year is configured in Household Settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total gift amount from won Opportunities closed this year where this Contact is the primary donor.
CustomField.label: Total Gifts This Year
